title: Scrolls and Curses
description: Adds magic scrolls, used for enchanting, and new treasure enchantments
body:
[Requires Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

[Requires Unremovable Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/unremovable-effects) **(1.21+ only)**

**Forge:** [Requires Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)



## "Scrolls and Curses" adds magic scrolls, used for enchanting, and new treasure enchantments



### Magic scrolls

Use scroll to enchant item in your offhand.

The better the scroll, the better enchantments it can give.

Scrolls can be found in dungeons.

**There are 3 magic scrolls:**

- Torn Magic Scroll
- Magic Scroll
- Powerful Magic Scroll

**and:**

- Cursed Scroll



**Enchanting with scroll doesnt require any level and can give treasure enchantments.**



### Cursed Scroll

Cursed scroll works a bit different than other scrolls:

- it gives only treasure enchantments (unobtainable through enchanting table)
- it gives only 1 enchantment per use
- it can be used on already enchanted items

In most cases, this scroll gives curse enchantments, but has a small chance (4% default) to give non-cursed treasure enchantment.

The chance for getting non-curse enchantment increases with every enchantment (and enchantment level) of item on which Cursed Scroll is used.



### Enchantments

There are 4 curse enchantments and 2 non-cursed treasure enchantments:

- Absorption (for chestplate)
- Amok (for weapons)
- Curse of Ender (for armor)
- Curse of Flames (for weapons)
- Curse of Rust (for breakable items)
- Curse of Vulnerability (for armor)



**What do they do:**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Absorption** enchantment grants user absorption effect for 60 seconds after getting damage from mob,

**Amok** enchantment grants user speed and strength for 10 seconds after killing enemy (length of effects stacks)

**Curse of Ender** enchantment has a chance to give user Chaotic Teleportation effect after getting damage from mob (chaotic teleportation teleports you in random places nearby),

**Curse of Flames** enchantment has a chance to ignite enemy and sets USER on fire after attacking enemy, that is burning or in lava,

**Curse of Rust** enchantment makes items lose 1 point of durability more with each use,

**Curse of Vulnerability** makes all protection enchantments weaker.

</details>
